steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The colon points to what's impressive about his work: a diverse range of musical talents in different areas. The blank must express this quality of variety.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content: Varied directly means having different kinds or types—the exact quality the passage highlights about his body of work. The other three describe unrelated characteristics. That matches choice D — D is correct.
